description_long: This is a middle-aged adult male figure dressed in business attire, featuring a collared long-sleeve shirt tucked into a pair of straight-legged trousers. The shirt is complemented by a necktie, and the figure wears a belt at the waist. The shoes are formal and closed-toe, suitable for office or urban environments. The figure has a receding hairline with short hair on the sides and back, and the facial features are neutral and clean-shaven. The overall build is average, with arms extended horizontally and feet placed together, giving a professional and approachable appearance.
description: A middle-aged male in business attire with a collared shirt, tie, trousers, and formal shoes, standing with arms outstretched. The figure has a receding hairline and an average build.
description_view_0: Front view shows the collared shirt, necktie, belt, and formal shoes, with arms extended and facial features visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the receding hairline, and the straight fit of the trousers and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the shirt, trousers, and shoes, as well as the short hair on the back of the head.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, arm, and the overall silhouette of the figure.
attribute_clothing_type: business shirt with necktie and straight-legged trousers
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: balding with short hair on sides and back
